name: Snyk breadth — postMessage handler without origin validation

provenance.note: Constructed snippet illustrating a message handler that processes event.data without checking event.origin, accepting messages from any window. Breadth supplement (spec §4.3) — lower realism, not an external-validity claim.

notes: Vulnerable (+) side removes the event.origin guard before handleMessage(event.data); safe (-) side returns unless event.origin === 'https://trusted.example.com'. Missing origin check is a TP per R-09 pattern (a).
